name: DocuSign, Inc.
description: DocuSign, Inc. provides electronic signature solutions. The company offers DocuSign eSignature, an electronic signature solution that enables agreements to be signed electronically on various devices. It also provides DocuSign CLM, which automates workflow across the entire agreement process; and Gen for Salesforce, which allows sales representatives to generate agreements. DocuSign serves customers in financial services, insurance, technology, healthcare, life sciences, real estate, and government sectors worldwide.
